query:
INSERT INTO core.events (
            id,
            source,
            event_type,
            host,
            payload,
            ts_orig,
            source_event_ids
        ) VALUES (
            $1::uuid,
            $2,
            $3,
            $4,
            $5,
            $6,
            ARRAY[$7::uuid, $8::uuid]::uuid[]::uuid[]
        )
